title: Modern Controlling
description: Modern Controlling is a mod to improve the control of vanilla.
body:
# Modern Controlling Modern Controlling is a mod to improve the control of vanilla. At present, it can: - Use a new control settings screen, similar to what Mojang did in 21w37a. (Core) - Better keybinding settings screen. Similar to [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling). (Keybind) - Export your keybinding settings as a file (or import). (Keybind) - When ANY key is pressed, all key bindings for this key can be activated. (Can be disabled) (Toolkit) - Now a single keybinding can bind multiple keys. (Toolkit) - And more! This mod is modular and can be added as required. - [Core](https://modrinth.com/project/modern-controlling-core): The foundation of other modules. - [Keybind](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-controlling-keybind): A better keybinding settings screen and key position files. - [Toolkit](https://modrinth.com/mod/modern-controlling-toolkit): Some small functions. ## Note: - "Toolkit" depends on Mixin 0.7+ and MixinExtras 0.4.0+.
Suggest using MixinBooter 10.0+ to provide Mixin and MixinExtras. - It is recommended to turn on "Force Unicode Font" in language settings to better use this mod. - You ***CAN*** use this mod in your modpack.
